channel.title: The Economic Edge: Master Your Wealth

item.title: How East Asia should respond to its China shock
item.description:
"Explore the economic and geopolitical implications of China's rising influence on East Asia. Tune in to 'How East Asia should respond to its China shock' for expert insights and analysis on the region's future." (155 characters, including spaces)
Alternatively, a longer version: "Delve into the complexities of China's economic and geopolitical impact on East Asia. Our podcast, 'How East Asia should respond to its China shock', offers in-depth discussions and expert opinions on the region's strategic response to China's growing influence." (160 characters, including spaces, for Google search results)
